```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement secure backup and recovery procedures"
---
# Secure Backup
## Task
Implement secure backup and recovery procedures.
## Requirements
1. Encrypt backups at rest. 2. Store backups in geographically separate location.
3. Test restore procedures regularly. 4. Implement backup integrity verification.
5. Set retention policies per data classification.
## Constraints
- Encrypt with separate key from data. Test restore monthly. Verify integrity on every backup.
## Success Criteria
- Backups encrypted and stored offsite. Restores tested. Integrity verified.
```
